data.title: KKR Stockholders Approve Governance Amendments, Adjourn Vote
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

KKR & Co ( (KKR) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, KKR & Co. Inc. held a special meeting of stockholders at which investors approved several amendments to its certificate of incorporation and a proposal to allow adjournment. Stockholders backed changes making stockholder meetings the sole mechanism for approving matters requiring common shareholder votes, granting the board exclusive authority to fill vacancies and new directorships, and fixing the size of the board while streamlining the charter.

These amendments, which will become effective as of the company’s designated sunset date once filed in Delaware, further centralize governance authority with KKR’s board and formalize how shareholder decisions are taken. A separate proposal to remove supermajority voting requirements for certain charter amendments received support from 85.97% of outstanding common shares but fell short of the 90% threshold, leading to adjournment of the meeting on that item until May 21, 2026 to allow additional time for voting.

The most recent analyst rating on (KKR) stock is a Buy with a $153.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on KKR & Co stock, see the KKR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on KKR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KKR is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weaker/volatile cash-flow history, elevated leverage and balance-sheet data uncertainty, and a clearly bearish technical setup (price below all major moving averages with negative MACD). Offsetting these are a constructive earnings-call outlook (confidence in exceeding 2026 FRE/ANI targets alongside record fundraising and embedded gains), but valuation remains a headwind given the high P/E and low dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on KKR stock, click here.

More about KKR & Co

KKR & Co. Inc. is a global investment firm operating in the financial services industry, best known for private equity, credit, and infrastructure investing. The company manages capital for institutional and individual investors worldwide, focusing on generating long-term returns through active ownership and diversified alternative asset strategies.

Average Trading Volume: 8,030,438

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $90.62B

Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. III Class A ( (IPCX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 24, 2026, Inflection Point Acquisition Corp. VI appointed investment professional Jae Hyun (James) Park as an independent Class II director, with his term expiring at the company’s second annual stockholders’ meeting, and named him to its Audit Committee. Park brings extensive experience in cross-border capital markets, SPAC deals, private equity and commodities, including leadership roles at Keystone Acquisition Corp. and prior work with USA Rare Earth and KPMG.

Also on April 24, 2026, the company entered into an indemnity agreement and a standard-form letter agreement with Park, aligning his protections and obligations with those of existing directors from the initial public offering. These agreements enhance his legal and financial safeguards while confirming there are no special arrangements, family relationships or related-party transactions influencing his appointment, underscoring the board’s governance and independence standards.

Willow Lane Acquisition Corporation Class A ( (WLAC) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 24, 2026, Willow Lane’s sponsor amended and restated its existing transfer agreement with Goodrich ILMJS LLC, extending the deadline to complete the previously agreed sale of 27.5% of its 4,628,674 founder shares and 4,007,222 private warrants to within six months after the closing of Willow Lane’s proposed business combination with Boost Run or shortly after effectiveness of a post-closing resale registration. The amended terms place the transfer securities in escrow until payment is made and are reflected in updated proxy disclosures that clarify post-closing ownership, highlight that the sponsor is positioned to realize a substantial profit even if public investors suffer losses, and show how the sponsor’s 26.79% stake significantly reduces the level of public shareholder support needed to achieve quorum and approve the April 30, 2026 merger vote.

Through this transaction, Willow Lane aims to take Boost Run public via a new Delaware holding company, Boost Run Inc. (Pubco), with its shareholders ultimately owning stakes in the combined entity.

data.description:

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Grupo Supervielle SA ( (SUPV) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 23, 2026, Grupo Supervielle S.A. held its ordinary and extraordinary shareholders’ meeting via Microsoft Teams, with 78.8% of share capital and 85.46% of voting rights represented, validating the virtual format under its bylaws and Argentine corporate law. Shareholders approved the financial statements and regulatory reports for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, confirming the group’s reporting continuity and regulatory compliance.

The meeting ratified the performance of both the Board of Directors and the Supervisory Committee for 2025 and endorsed director and syndic remuneration, including AR$843.4 million for directors and AR$14.1 million for the supervisory body. Investors also backed governance changes by expanding the board to eight regular members, electing new non-independent directors and alternates, and renewing the supervisory committee, moves that consolidate management continuity and fine-tune the company’s governance structure for the coming fiscal years.

The governance resolutions, including the two-year mandates for new directors through the 2027 accounts approval meeting and one-year terms for syndics, reinforce oversight while aligning with both Argentine CNV criteria and U.S. SEC independence standards. This combination of solid quorum, broad approval of accounts and leadership, and an expanded board signals stability for stakeholders and positions Grupo Supervielle to navigate upcoming regulatory and market challenges in Argentina’s financial sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (SUPV) stock is a Buy with a $14.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Grupo Supervielle SA stock, see the SUPV Stock Forecast page.

Offsetting these risks, the latest earnings call provided constructive 2026 guidance and highlighted capital strength, but credit-quality headwinds remain a key near-term overhang.

An update from Nuwellis ( (NUWE) ) is now available.

On February 26, 2026, E.F. Hutton & Co. filed a complaint in the New York State Supreme Court alleging that Nuwellis, Inc. breached an engagement letter appointing Hutton as exclusive placement agent for one or more registered securities offerings and seeking compensatory and punitive damages plus related costs. data.title: Equifax Expands Revolving Credit Facility to Boost Liquidity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Equifax ( (EFX) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 23, 2026, Equifax Inc. and several international subsidiaries amended their existing revolving credit agreement, expanding the unsecured facility from $1.5 billion to $2 billion and raising swingline loan availability from $150 million to $200 million. The amendment also removes a 10 basis point credit spread adjustment on Term SOFR borrowings, while extending $1.9 billion of the facility’s termination date by one year to August 25, 2029, steps that enhance the company’s liquidity profile and financial flexibility without otherwise changing core terms of the agreement.

These changes are expected to support Equifax’s ongoing funding needs across its global operations and could strengthen its capacity to invest, refinance or manage working capital in a competitive financial data and analytics market. The remaining $100 million of the revolving credit commitments still matures on August 25, 2028, maintaining a staggered maturity profile that may help the company manage refinancing risk over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (EFX) stock is a Buy with a $220.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Equifax stock, see the EFX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EFX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EFX is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial performance (growth and strong absolute free cash flow) and a constructive earnings update with improving margins and reaffirmed cash generation. These positives are tempered by high leverage and weaker cash conversion quality signals, while the stock’s valuation is expensive and technicals show only a partial recovery within a longer-term downtrend.

To see Spark’s full report on EFX stock, click here.

More about Equifax

Equifax Inc. is a global data, analytics and technology company operating in the consumer credit reporting and information services industry. The company provides credit information, risk assessment, identity verification and related financial data services to lenders, businesses and governments across multiple international markets, including the U.S., Canada, Europe and the Asia-Pacific region.

data.title: Odyssey Group Secures Exclusive Rights to BreastCheck Screening
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Odyssey Group International ( (ODYY) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Odyssey Health, Inc. closed a Master Technology and Sub-license Agreement with NeuRX Health, Inc., including an amendment executed the same day, granting Odyssey Medical Devices, Inc. exclusive worldwide marketing and distribution rights to BreastCheck™, a non-invasive test for breast abnormalities. The definitive sub-license, announced on April 22, 2026, enables Odyssey to enter the approximately $26 billion global breast cancer screening market with an at-home, adjunct screening tool registered with regulators in the U.S., European Union, and United Kingdom, supporting a strategic shift toward revenue-generating commercial products and paving the way for near-term recurring revenue once sales commence in the second half of the year.

BreastCheck™, developed by Davion Healthcare PLC, provides results in about 15 minutes by comparing temperature readings at multiple points on each breast via a mobile app to help detect early-stage abnormalities. Positioned as a first-line screening solution rather than a replacement for mammography, the product is intended to increase accessibility and frequency of screening, which may enhance patient engagement in the context of rising global breast cancer incidence and further strengthen Odyssey’s portfolio and long-term growth prospects.

More about Odyssey Group International

Odyssey Health, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on life‑saving medical solutions, operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Odyssey Medical Devices, Inc. The company’s strategy centers on creating and acquiring medical devices and intellectual property that offer technological advantages, strong clinical utility, and access to substantial market opportunities.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: urban-gro Restructures Debt and Issues Equity to Lender
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

urban-gro ( (UGRO) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 20, 2026, urban-gro, Inc. and its Canadian subsidiary entered into a forbearance agreement and an exchange agreement with Hudson Global Ventures after Hudson became the new lender under previously existing loan documents originally held by Grow Hill LLC. As of April 10, 2026, the borrower was in default on about $1.94 million in obligations, and Hudson agreed to temporarily forbear from exercising default remedies until the earlier of April 30, 2026, or certain termination events, in exchange for increasing the loan principal to $2.8 million and payment of fees and expenses.

Concurrently, urban-gro agreed to partially repay the restructured debt by issuing common stock to Hudson in a private, exempt exchange, thereby reducing the outstanding loan balance while leaving any remaining amount in place under the modified loan documents. The transaction shifts a portion of the company’s indebtedness into equity, tightening terms on the residual debt and underscoring near-term liquidity pressure and lender control, with implications for dilution of existing shareholders and the company’s capital structure going forward.

Spark’s Take on UGRO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, UGRO is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (large losses, deteriorating margins, and deeply negative equity), only partially offset by improved 2025 cash flow. Technicals are mixed with some medium-term support and oversold signals, while valuation metrics provided are not meaningful and do not add support. Corporate events are moderately positive due to regained Nasdaq compliance and a strategic pivot/merger, but financing and forbearance-related actions keep risk elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on UGRO stock, click here.

More about urban-gro

Urban-gro, Inc. is a U.S.-based company that, through its subsidiaries, provides technology and related solutions, with operations that include a Canadian unit, urban-gro Canada Technologies Inc. The company finances its activities through secured loan arrangements and equity issuances, reflecting an ongoing reliance on structured debt and capital markets access.

Edible Garden AG , Inc. ( (EDBL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Edible Garden AG, Inc. entered into exchange agreements with Streeterville Capital, LLC to swap 3,301 shares of its Series B Preferred Stock, with an aggregate stated value of $3,301,000, for 3,587,478 shares of its common stock. The number of common shares issued was based on the Nasdaq Minimum Price of the prior trading day, with the unregistered issuance conducted under a Securities Act exemption, effectively converting preferred equity into common equity and altering the company’s capital structure.

This exchange with Streeterville Capital, LLC reflects a shift in Edible Garden’s financing mix that could impact existing shareholders through dilution of common stock. By replacing preferred shares with a larger volume of common shares, the company potentially simplifies its equity base, which may affect voting dynamics, future financing flexibility, and the profile of its institutional investor relationships.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Select Medical ( (SEM) ).

At its annual meeting of stockholders held on April 23, 2026, Select Medical shareholders re-elected three Class II directors, including executive leaders, and gave strong support in a non-binding vote to the compensation of the company’s named executive officers. Investors also ratified the appointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year, reinforcing continuity in the company’s financial oversight.

Shareholders approved an amendment to phase out the company’s classified board structure, a move that will gradually shift to annual director elections and is generally seen as aligning governance more closely with shareholder interests. In advisory votes on shareholder rights, investors backed a company proposal to allow special meetings at a 25% ownership threshold but decisively rejected a competing shareholder proposal seeking a lower 10% threshold, signaling preference for enhanced, but not expansive, meeting rights.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financial performance—improving leverage and solid cash generation offset by meaningful 2025 margin/earnings deterioration. Technical indicators lean bearish in the near term. Valuation is supportive, while the earnings call was mixed (constructive 2026 outlook but significant outpatient and cost headwinds). The announced go-private transaction is a notable positive catalyst.

Select Medical Holdings Corporation operates in the health care services industry, providing specialized post-acute care through long-term acute care hospitals, inpatient rehabilitation facilities, outpatient rehabilitation clinics, and related services. data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest update is out from Agree Realty ( (ADC) ).

On April 24, 2026, Agree Realty Corporation and its operating partnership launched a new at-the-market equity program allowing the company to issue and sell up to $1.75 billion of common stock through a syndicate of major banks and broker-dealers, while simultaneously terminating a prior ATM program established in October 2024. The structure also includes both contingent and non-contingent forward sale agreements, giving Agree Realty flexible tools to raise equity capital over time, manage the timing and pricing of share issuances, and potentially mitigate market impact, which could support its future acquisition pipeline and balance sheet management.

Under the program, sales may be executed as negotiated or at-the-market transactions on the NYSE or through market makers, with sales agents and forward sellers earning commissions of up to 2% of gross sales or forward sale prices. Agree Realty expects primarily to physically settle fixed share forward transactions to receive cash proceeds, but it retains the option to cash or net-share settle, providing additional flexibility in how it funds growth and responds to capital market conditions.

Brera Holdings PLC Class B ( (SLMT) ) has shared an update.

On April 24, 2026, Solmate Infrastructure entered into a Rights Agreement with Equiniti Trust Company that authorizes one purchase right for each outstanding Class B ordinary share, with the rights issued to shareholders of record on May 5, 2026 and expiring on April 23, 2027. Each right allows holders to buy one ordinary share at $6.00 if an investor crosses a 9.99% ownership threshold, or 20% for certain existing institutional holders, triggering dilution mechanisms designed to discourage hostile or undervalued takeover attempts while giving the board time to evaluate any proposals and negotiate on behalf of all shareholders.

data.title: GridAI Technologies Faces Default on Revolving Loan Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from GridAI Technologies ( (GRDX) ) is now available.

GridAI Technologies Corp., formerly Entero Therapeutics, Inc., entered into a Revolving Loan Agreement on January 27, 2025, with 1396974 BC Ltd., under which principal, interest, and related amounts were due in full by the January 31, 2026 maturity date. The facility provided the company with up to $700,000 in principal, and all obligations were contractually scheduled to be repaid by that date.

On April 1, 2026, the lender’s counsel sent GridAI Technologies a demand letter asserting the company is in default because the maturity date passed without repayment, demanding $1,014,675 inclusive of principal, accrued interest, and a 20% default-related increase. The company is evaluating the implications of the default notice and is in active discussions with the lender, a development that could impact its liquidity position and near-term financial flexibility.

More about GridAI Technologies

GridAI Technologies Corp., formerly known as Entero Therapeutics, Inc., is a publicly listed company that has transitioned from its prior identity in the therapeutics sector and now operates under a technology-focused brand. The company engages in financing arrangements such as revolving loan facilities to support its corporate activities and working capital needs within its evolving business strategy.

data.title: Bumble Refinances Debt with New 2030 Credit Facilities
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bumble ( (BMBL) ) has provided an update.

On April 24, 2026, Bumble subsidiaries entered into a new $475 million senior secured term loan facility and a $50 million super-priority revolving credit facility, both carrying leverage and liquidity covenants and maturing in 2030. The term loan amortizes monthly with rising annual amortization rates and bears interest at either a base rate plus 7.00% or Term SOFR plus 8.00%, while the revolving facility, senior in right of payment, is priced at a base rate plus 3.00% or Term SOFR plus 4.00%.

Both facilities are guaranteed on a senior secured basis by Bumble’s U.S. and certain foreign subsidiaries, secured by first-priority liens on substantially all borrower and guarantor assets, and include step-down leverage ratio tests and minimum liquidity thresholds rising to $50 million. Using proceeds from the new term loan and cash on hand, Bumble simultaneously repaid and terminated its prior 2020 credit agreement, effectively refinancing its capital structure and tightening its financial covenant framework for the coming years.

The most recent analyst rating on (BMBL) stock is a Hold with a $4.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bumble stock, see the BMBL Stock Forecast page.

The company conducts its financing activities through various subsidiaries, which enter into credit agreements and related guarantees to support liquidity and capital structure management.
